items.title: SOL reclaims $72, but onchain data flags weakening momentum
items.whyYouShouldCare: SOL's price recovery to $72 is notable, but declining on-chain metrics suggest potential challenges for sustained upward momentum.

items.title: Jito hits $1.75B revenue milestone, but what does this mean for its price rally?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Jito's achievement of $1.75 billion in revenue highlights its growing ecosystem impact, which may influence future price dynamics.

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: AAVE jumps 8.9%, leading index higher
items.whyYouShouldCare: AAVE's 8.9% increase contributes positively to the CoinDesk 20 index, indicating a potential shift in market sentiment that could affect SOL indirectly.
